visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in a dimly lit office, looking down at a desk. He then turns and walks away from the camera, his back to the viewer. The office has a bulletin board with papers on it and a window with blinds.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a commanding tone, followed by the sound of a door opening.
